scripts.version:print:
node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); const sha=require('child_process').execSync('git rev-parse --short HEAD').toString().trim(); console.log('
🚀 Deployed: v'+p.version+' · '+sha+' · '+new Date().toLocaleString('en-US',{month:'short',day:'numeric',year:'numeric',hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit'})+'
   Look for this in the bottom-right badge of the app.
')"
scripts.deploy:prod: npm test && npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting:meraki && npm run version:print
scripts.deploy:staging: npm test && npm run build:staging && firebase hosting:channel:deploy staging --only meraki && npm run version:print
scripts.deploy:prod:skip-tests: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting:meraki && npm run version:print
scripts.deploy:plumenexus: cd plumenexus && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && firebase deploy --only hosting:plumenexus
scripts.rollback:prod: git revert HEAD --no-edit && npm run deploy:prod && echo '\n↩  Rolled prod back by reverting the last commit and redeploying.'
scripts.rollback:console: node -e "console.log('\\nOpen Firebase Console → Hosting → Release History to roll back to any specific past release:\\nhttps://console.firebase.google.com/project/meraki-salon-manager/hosting/main\\n');"
